The '''Ott system''' was located in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The system was the terminus of the [[Trition Trade Route]], and contained the planet [[Gandle Ott]]. It was linked to the [[Charis system/Legends|Charis]], [[Mairne system/Legends|Mairne]] and [[Peirs system/Legends|Peirs systems]] via [[Hyperspace route/Legends|Hyperlane]].<ref name="tdc" />
